score_confidence_reason: Only one of five paper-reported variants was trained. Score on the matched metric is excellent but the breadth of evidence is narrow.

score_breakdown.score_formula: max(0, base - sir_penalty - unmatched_penalty); unmatched_penalty waived because the four unmatched variants were intentionally not run, not failed.

parametric.evidence: Paper says 'per-pixel mean subtracted'; per-channel is a documented alternative interpretation. SIR confidence 0.75.
parametric.suggested_fix: Already exposed as a config flag. Ablate with --override data.mean_subtraction=per_channel if the deviation grows on deeper variants.

parametric.evidence: Paper does not state whether weight decay applies to BN parameters. Excluding them is the modern convention. SIR ambiguities[1] confidence 0.70.
parametric.suggested_fix: Already exposed as a config flag. Ablate with --override training.apply_wd_to_bn=true if results degrade.

parametric.evidence: Paper cites He et al. 2015 PReLU paper for initialization. fan_in with ReLU nonlinearity is the documented variant; SIR confidence 0.90.
parametric.suggested_fix: No action needed — the current value matches what the cited reference specifies.
